sources.source_name: Madrid Population By District And Barrio API
sources.description: Official annual population by district and barrio from the Madrid open data portal.
discovery_notes: Selected as a stronger demographic source for densification-oriented analysis than generic amenity APIs.
The explicit limit parameter was removed, so the API now falls back to its default page size rather than the earlier 5-row test sample.

sources.description: Territorial indicator panel for Madrid districts and barrios, including socio-demographic and housing-related variables.
discovery_notes: Selected as a potentially rich supporting source for territorial comparison.
The explicit limit parameter was removed, so the API now falls back to its default page size rather than the earlier 5-row test sample.

sources.description: Administrative district and barrio boundary download used as the spatial reference source for district-led comparison.
discovery_notes: Selected as the key support source for district-level mapping and spatial aggregation in the Block D workflow.
This source is geospatial JSON rather than tabular JSON and is intended to anchor later district alignment logic.
